evidence: "This is really a great movie... the story and script are well written and intelligent... If you liked Solaris or Vanilla Sky (with Tom Cruise) you will like this one."
"Good for a movie night at home... it is an interesting spy movie with WWII history, intrigue, and romance."
"Big disappointment. Movie does not come across as an intelligent film, not well scripted nor well made for the caliber of actors and complex subject matter."
"I was disappointed. This could have been really good. Good actors... bad screenplay."
"I was also expecting a big surprise in the end or a twist... it was missing something throughout."
"This movie was poorly scripted, very predictable, and mostly boring."
"Terrific movie... amazing cinematography and music, intelligent storyline."
"I love Ray Bradbury stories. This movie is right on track with the book."
"Love this side of Jim Carrey - very serious side, calm, with subtle, circumstantial humor."
"The cinematography seems to reflect a graininess like weathered wood so that you feel like you are really back in time."
"Soundtrack is good, love the Beck song."
"What a great movie! My 17 year old daughter and I both watched it together and she enjoyed it as much as I did."
"This is really a great movie... it's the kind of movie to discuss afterwards and then watch again."

summary: The user shows a strong preference for sci-fi and drama genres, valuing high production quality and emotional resonance in films. They express mixed feelings about narrative complexity and pacing, indicating a desire for engaging storytelling that is well-crafted and visually appealing.
